title: DraCo: Draft as CoT for Text-to-Image Preview and Rare Concept Generation

methodology.name: Draft-as-CoT (DraCo)
methodology.description: An interleaved CoT reasoning approach that fully leverages the unified framework for text-to-image generation

key_features: Generates a low-resolution draft image as visual planning
Verifies the draft with the model's understanding capability to check for semantic misalignments
Refines and enriches the draft through selective correction and super-resolution
Leverages both textual and visual content for better planning and verification

figures.title: Conceptual Comparison of CoT Reasoning for T2I Generation
